attacking_style: Rarely initiates attacks; when he does, it's via sustained power in final kilometer of climbs (Oropa 2017) rather than explosive accelerations. Prefers diesel tempo to repeated surges, vulnerable when forced to respond to multiple accelerations.
team_tactics: Frequently isolated without team support on crucial climbs, forced to bridge gaps solo using TT strength. Team (Sunweb/Jumbo) often exhausted early or poorly positioned entering critical phases. Later transitioned to elite domestique role for Roglič, executing aggressive disruption attacks.
terrain_preference: Excels on long, steady gradient time trials (won 39.8km rolling TT, Jerusalem ITT). Vulnerable on steep gradients (Zoncolan losses) and short explosive climbs. Strong on technical descents when isolated. Heat tolerance excellent for large rider.
vulnerability: Crumbles under repeated accelerations (shook head after third attack, Giro 2018). Catastrophic form collapses after injury/illness (2019 Giro crash abandonment, 2022 form crisis). Poor recovery between efforts. Mechanical issues due to isolation from teammates.
key_patterns: Uses time trial power to bridge gaps tactically rather than matching accelerations (2017 pink defense)
Frequently isolated from teammates on key climbs, forced into solo chase efforts (5+ instances)
Exceptional TT instinct-based pacing without telemetry, marginal gains specialist (thousandth-second victory, 48kph average)
Form collapse pattern: strong TT followed by drift on climbs suggests poor recovery (UAE 2022)
Transitioned to elite domestique by 2020, massive pulls sacrificing own GC position for leader
Vulnerable to short explosive climbs even at moderate gradients, needs sustained efforts
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 observations show catastrophic form collapse from 2017 Giro winner - dropped early on moderate gradients, abandoned Catalunya unwell, suggests chronic condition or incomplete comeback from multi-month layoff despite early TT promise
